claim: The text uses a combination of substitution and transposition ciphers in the herbal section.
evidence_for: The herbal section has higher entropy levels compared to other sections
The word-final glyph distribution in the herbal section shows a higher frequency of 'y' and 'n', which are common in transposition ciphers
test: Run a mutual information test on the relationship between glyphs in the herbal section

tests_run.test: run a mutual information test on the relationship between glyphs in the herbal section
